ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "fleet" TEXT /* Fleet category of the boat */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat */,
  "sail_no" INTEGER /* Sail number of the boat */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club the boat belongs to */,
  "helm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the helm of the boat */,
  "phrf" INTEGER /* PHRF rating of the boat */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the boat was manufactured */,
  "boat_type" TEXT /* Type of boat (e.g., monohull, catamaran) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the boat */,
  "boat_length" INTEGER /* Length of the boat in feet */,
  "boat_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the boat in pounds */,
  "boat_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the boat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_helm_id FOREIGN KEY ("helm_id") REFERENCES helms ("helm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the sailing club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the club */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the club's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the club */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the club */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "helms" (
  "helm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each helm */,
  "helm_name" TEXT /* Name of the helm */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the helm */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the helm */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the helm */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the helm */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the helm (e.g., novice, intermediate, expert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("helm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Scheduled start time of the race */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Scheduled end time of the race */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the race takes place */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., regatta, series) */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of boats participating in the race */,
  "race_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the race in nautical miles */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Brief description of the weather conditions during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the boat */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the boat in the race */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Actual start time of the boat */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Actual finish time of the boat */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time for the boat to complete the race */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time based on PHRF */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Penalties incurred by the boat during the race */,
  "points_awarded" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the boat based on their performance */,
  "final_position" INTEGER /* Final position of the boat after any adjustments (e.g., penalties) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sailor, race officer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race registration */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the boat */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration for the race */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "payment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount paid for the registration */,
  "registration_method" TEXT /* Method of registration (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_registrations_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_registrations_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boat_sailors" (
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailor */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the boat */,
  "sailor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sailor */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the sailor on the boat */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the sailor (e.g., novice, intermediate, expert) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the sailor joined the boat */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the sailor (e.g., skipper, crew) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boat_sailors_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race review */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the race (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback about the race */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_reviews_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
